Package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.management.logging

package org.apache.juneau.rest.server.management.logging
Opt-in non-JUL LogBackend adapters for the /loggers management endpoint.

juneau-rest-server ships only the java.util.logging backend, keeping the core management surface dependency-free. This add-on supplies the Logback (LogbackLogBackend) and Log4j2 (Log4j2LogBackend) adapters, with the backends declared provided so they never leak transitively. A consumer drives one by declaring it explicitly via LoggersSettings.create().backend(new LogbackLogBackend()) — the endpoint never auto-detects.

Since:
10.0.0
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.apache.juneau.rest.server.management
    Actuator-style management-surface endpoints (server-module flavors).
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    Log4j2LogBackend
    LogBackend adapter for Apache Log4j 2, for use behind the /loggers management endpoint.
    LogbackLogBackend
    LogBackend adapter for Logback (the SLF4J native backend), for use behind the /loggers management endpoint.
